extensionKeys.doc: The extension key carrying the machine-readable error code (one of the AUTH_* constants from AuthErrorCodes / equivalent).
The extension key carrying the array of TKMessage objects (translation keys + parameter bindings) for client-side rendering.

The extension key carrying the array of per-field InputError objects (field name + TKMessage[] errors) for client-side form-level error rendering. Mirrors the inputErrors field on the native D2Result envelope. Emitted only when the source D2Result carries non-empty InputErrors; absent otherwise.

The extension key carrying the closed-enum semantic ErrorCategory wire string (conflict / infrastructure_unavailable / internal_error / not_found / partial_success / payload_too_large / policy_denied / rate_limited / validation_failure). Mirrors the category field on the native D2Result envelope + the gRPC envelope's category — cross-transport parity. Lets a consumer branch on failure class without resolving the error code through the registry. Emitted only when the source D2Result carries a non-null Category; absent otherwise.
The extension key carrying the W3C trace id for diagnostic correlation. Unprefixed (W3C-OTel naming alignment) — distinct from the d2_-namespaced D2-private keys.

The extension key carrying the request correlation id — either the inbound X-Correlation-Id header value (cap-validated against MAX_CORRELATION_ID_LENGTH) or a fresh GUID generated by the customizer when no inbound value was present. Unprefixed (HTTP-convention alignment with the X-Correlation-Id header naming) — distinct from the d2_-namespaced D2-private keys.

The fallback Title used when no httpStatus-specific entry matches.
